headline: Jannik Sinner rolls into May 9 on a 44-match win streak
body: Jannik Sinner's active win streak now stands at 44 matches, the longest active run on tour. The streak began at BNP Paribas Open on March 7.

headline: Arthur Fils's Clay edge is the widest on tour
body: Arthur Fils's rating on Clay sits 540 points above their Grass rating, the largest cross-surface gap among active top-50 players. Best surface rating: 2250. Worst: 1709.

headline: Bryan Shelton's rating sits 468 points above their career peak
body: Bryan Shelton's current Glicko rating is 2214, versus a career peak of 1745 set in 1993. That is a 468-point swing from prime form.

headline: Jiri Lehecka finally beats Taylor Fritz after 5 prior losses
body: Jiri Lehecka's win at Miami Open on March 24, 2026 broke a 5-match losing streak against Taylor Fritz. It is the first career win in this head-to-head.
